title: Vortigern Farming Pack
description: VortigernTheGrey's personal farming modpack. Inspired by Snifferish's Farming RPG Video, go watch it!
body:
## About
After seeing Snifferish's Farming RPG video ([watch it!!!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DKlAWlwXVH4)) I felt inspired to make a modpack similar, but for 1.21.1! After the release of the Let's Do Farm and Charm family of mods for 1.21.1, I can finally make it a possibility. It is very much a work in progress, and I will be adding some mods as they are updated for 1.21.1.
